name: BELTED CARGO PANTS
description: A fresh take on tailoring — these crisp white wide-leg pants balance structure and ease with their artfully draped silhouette. Designed with a soft pleat at the front and an extended strap detail that adds visual length and understated edge. Made from a lightweight cotton-blend fabric, they sit low to mid-rise with a relaxed fit through the leg for effortless movement. Finished with side pockets and clean stitching, they’re the kind of trousers that elevate even the simplest tank.
